name: Collect n Evolve
author: Poki
description: Collect n Evolve is a fun and bright simulation game where you play as various cute and cool animals trying to evolve. Start out as a humble lizard and keep growing into stronger and mightier animals. Beat foes, collect food, and hang out with your friends in the colorful world of Collect n Evolve. What animal will you turn into next? How to play Collect n Evolve? Walk around using WASD, the arrow keys, or the buttons on mobile. Who created Collect n Evolve? Collect n Evolve is created by Kimchi Soup Studios. Play their other game on Poki: Animal Obby ! How can I play Collect n Evolve for free? You can play Collect n Evolve for free on Poki. Can I play Collect n Evolve on mobile devices and desktop? Collect n Evolve can be played on your computer and mobile devices like phones and tablets. Can I play Collect n Evolve with my friend? Yes! Collect n Evolve has online multiplayer where you can play with your friends.
